title: After 10 Years, Is Bihar Ready For Big Change? Will New CM Samrat Choudhary Lift Liquor Ban? Here's What We Know So Far
description: Samrat Choudhary, whose election to the CM's post brought in a new era in Bihar, now faces a crucial decision- whether the state will finally lift liquor ban after 10 years? With buzz intensifying over the prospect of the end of prohibition, here is what we know so far:
